summary: Iteration 5 (Edit Employee feature). Backend regression 47/47 PASS. Frontend admin + manager Edit flows PASS end-to-end on 390x844 mobile viewport: Edit button visible below Share PDF, navigates to /employee/edit/<id>, form pre-fills all fields (name/phone/email/address/dob/joining/designation/salary/industry/aadhaar), PUT succeeds for both roles, and updates reflect on the detail screen. Manager correctly lacks the Delete button and has Edit+Share.

react_native_issues.issue: Cosmetic only: 'shadow*' style props deprecated warning (use boxShadow). Carried over from prior iterations.

regression_results.admin_edit_flow: PASS - Edit btn visible; form prefilled (name=Test Rajesh, phone=9876543210, designation prefilled, industry=Construction preselected); changed designation + salary=77777; PUT succeeded; detail screen shows new designation and ₹77,777 after re-navigation.
regression_results.manager_edit_flow: PASS - Manager sees Edit+Share but NOT Delete (count=0); form prefilled; PUT succeeded; new designation 'MgrEd-<ts>' reflected on detail screen; manager user cleaned up (DELETE 200).
regression_results.edit_route_registration: PASS - /employee/edit/[id] registered in _layout.tsx with header title 'Edit Employee'.

action_items: None blocking. Feature is fully functional for both admin and manager roles.

Optional LOW: After Save Changes, the RN-web Alert modal blocks the UI until 'OK' is tapped (expected RN behavior). Automated tests must dismiss the modal; human users just tap OK. If silent success is preferred on web, replace Alert with a Toast.
Optional LOW: Add a testID on the RN-web Alert 'OK' button (or wrap success path without Alert) to make E2E tests deterministic.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/app/employee/edit/[id].tsx correctly loads employee + industries in parallel, preserves aadhaar_image_base64 as-is for PUT, and strips null-valued fields before sending so the backend's exclude_unset filter treats them as 'no change'. All TextInputs have testID. Validation (name, phone, industry, aadhaar, email format) matches the onboarding screen.

/app/frontend/app/employee/[id].tsx: Edit button (testID='emp-detail-edit-btn') is visible to BOTH admin and manager (no isAdmin gate) — matches backend (PUT allowed for admin+manager; only DELETE is admin-only). Delete button correctly gated on isAdmin.
_layout.tsx: /employee/edit/[id] route registered with Stack.Screen (headerShown=true, title='Edit Employee'). Nested dynamic route under /employee/edit/ works with Expo Router.
Backend PUT /api/employees/{id} already accepts manager role (no backend changes required this iteration) — verified by existing pytest test_manager_can_update_employee.
seed_data_creation: Temporary manager user mgr-edit-<timestamp>@aanservices.in / Manager@1 created via POST /api/users and deleted (HTTP 200) after regression. Test Rajesh employee designation was updated during tests (persisted change).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Employee feature is green. testIDs on Edit screen: edit-emp-name, edit-emp-phone, edit-emp-email, edit-emp-address, edit-emp-dob, edit-emp-designation, edit-emp-joining, edit-emp-salary, edit-emp-industry-picker, edit-industry-option-<id>, edit-aadhaar-camera-btn, edit-aadhaar-gallery-btn, edit-emp-save-btn. After Save, RN-web renders a native-looking Alert modal; automation must tap the 'OK' button (or reload the detail URL) to continue. Metro is still in CI mode: `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` after any frontend edit. Admin: admin@aanservices.in / Admin@123.
